titleStmt.title: SII 9.521: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 521. (A.R. No. 559 of 1915.) ON A PILLAR SET UP IN FRONT OF THE VIRABHADRA TEMPLE AT CHERUVU-BELAGALLU, KURNOOL TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated the cyclic year Sarvajit, Āshāḍha, śu. 6, in the reign of Kṛishṇadēva-Mahārāya, corresponding to A.D. 1527 June 6, Thursday (if the month was Adhika) or July 5, Friday (if Nija). The date is not verifiable. The inscription records that Suṅkaṇa-Nāyaka, son of Dāḍi-Nāyaka, made a gift of a field in Keṟe-Beḷugallu in Ādavāni-durga under his amara, for the service of the god Vīrabhadra at Beḷugallu. The gift was made for the merit of the king and of the donor's father.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
sarvvajitusaṁhatsara
da Āśāḍa sudha 6lu
śrīmatu beḷugala baṁḍeya
vīrabhadradēvarige dāḍi
nāyakara maga suṁkaṇa
nāyakaru koṭṭa dha(ṁ)rmma
sāsanada kramaveṁteṁda
ḍe rājādhirāja rājapa
ramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa
śrīvīrakruṣṇadēvama
hārāyaru namage A
marake pālisida Ādavā
niyadurggadoḷagaṇa keṟe
beḷugallali paḍuvalli voku
ḷa yeṟeholanu baḍagalli vo
kkuḷa keṁnelanū Aṁtu
vu 02 ḷada holanu si
varātre pu(ṁ)ṇyakāla
dali kruṣṇamahādēvarāya
rige pu(ṁ)ṇyavāgali yeṁdu
dāḍināykarige pu(ṁ)ṇya
vāgaleṁdu

ḷige pasige
sahavāgi
koṭa dharma
śāsana nidhi ni
kṣēpa jala pā
ṣāṇa Aṣṭatē
ja bhōgaṁgaḷu
sahavāgi Ā
caṁdrārkasthā
yiyāgi nai
vēdyake yi
ṣṭanu samarpi
sidū yida
kārobbaru
ta(ṁ)ppidava
ru bra(ṁ)hmaha
tya gōhatya
māḍida
varu taṁma
taṁde tāya
varaṇāsi
yali koṁ
da pāpake hō
haru
śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.521 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
